notes.releasePage: Hosted release-page command rendering is direct-native first and exposes Cloudflare only as an explicit opt-in toggle. Gemini now uses the protected Google / Gemini v1beta command path when Cloudflare mode is selected.
notes.claudeCode: Launcher-first helper path through ~/.claude/settings.json. Route mode defaults to direct; Cloudflare is explicit opt-in for checked Anthropic-compatible targets, and the owner-field base stays at the custom-provider root without endpoint suffixes.
notes.geminiCli: Launcher-first helper path. GOOGLE_GEMINI_BASE_URL stays on the direct service root by default, and Cloudflare mode now switches Gemini to the protected Google / Gemini v1beta owner path instead of resolving back to direct.
notes.opencode: Helper-guided custom-provider path. OpenCode now keeps one checked custom-provider root contract in both direct and Cloudflare modes, and the launcher only swaps which root/base gets injected without appending endpoint suffixes.
notes.hermes: Helper-guided profile-local path. Hermes now keeps one checked custom-provider root contract in both direct and Cloudflare modes: create or update one dedicated profile under ~/.hermes/profiles/<profile> with profile-local .env, config.yaml, and SOUL.md, then let the launcher swap only the injected base_url root without appending endpoint suffixes.
notes.verification: Checked local smoke coverage verifies launcher route-mode behavior plus setup-script dry-run contracts in scope. This does not claim live provider, deploy, or hosted Pages proof.
